messages.content:
Produce your very own perspective on the given topic. Align tone and examples with the persona's background and traits. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Produce continuous prose. Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):

  "opinion": "Having experienced the loss of two children, I understand deeply how people can get worked up in debates. Vaccines are one thing, but discussing them feels like walking through a minefield sometimes. My depression makes me even more cautious about these conversations because it takes so much energy to stay positive and engaged at the same time.\n\nI think managing such discussions requires acknowledging our shared human vulnerability first. response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with discussions about healthcare and COVID vaccines.
response_parsed.opinion:
Having experienced the loss of two children, I understand deeply how people can get worked up in debates. It's like that feeling when you're waiting for your kids after school - intense emotions bubbling underneath. Vaccines are one thing, but discussing them feels like walking through a minefield sometimes. My depression makes me even more cautious about these conversations because it takes so much energy to stay positive and engaged at the same time.

I think managing such discussions requires acknowledging our shared human vulnerability first. As an engineer who builds structures for others' safety, I have respect for complex systems like public health initiatives. But my high extraversion means I don't shy away from disagreements either - that's part of why we're having this conversation right now!

When people bring up healthcare topics on social media where I spend just a few times weekly, it often feels overwhelming given my moderate openness level.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: Step-by-step derivation: Acknowledge personal background (loss of children + depression) → Explain how these shape perspective on emotional/controversial topics → Discuss balance between engineering logic and human emotion in debate → Consider role as observer vs participant → Address challenges with social media frequency → Emphasize need for empathy but not uncritical acceptance.
response_parsed.tone: Melancholic yet pragmatic, reflective of personal trauma combined with professional rationality
